subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy numerous letters were received, and their contents testified to the confirmations of the Peerless Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه های متعدد شما رسید مضمون دلیل بر تایید حضرت بیچون بود
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution
